CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, test_string VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, test_string) VALUES (1, '    Hello World  '), (2, '***Test String***'), (3, '   Spaces   '), (4, 'Trim#test');
SELECT ltrim(test_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ltrim(test_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT ltrim(test_string, '*') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT ltrim(test_string) AS trimmed_string FROM (SELECT test_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3) AS subquery;
SELECT ltrim(test_string, ' ') AS trimmed_string FROM (SELECT test_string FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE id IN (1, 3);
SELECT t1.test_string, ltrim(t2.test_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id = 1;
SELECT ltrim(test_string), COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY ltrim(test_string);
SELECT DISTINCT ltrim(test_string) FROM test_strings WHERE ltrim(test_string) != '';
INSERT INTO another_test (test_name) VALUES ('   LeadingSpaces'), ('**Stars**'), ('   TrailingSpaces   '), ('###Hash###');
SELECT ltrim(test_name, '*') FROM another_test WHERE test_name LIKE '%*%';
SELECT ltrim(t1.test_name), ltrim(t2.test_name) FROM another_test t1 JOIN another_test t2 ON t1.test_name <> t2.test_name;
SELECT ltrim(test_name) AS trimmed_name FROM (SELECT test_name FROM another_test) AS subquery WHERE LENGTH(ltrim(test_name)) > 0;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, test_string) VALUES (5, ''), (6, NULL);
SELECT ltrim(test_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT ltrim(test_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 6;
